items.name: Robot Animation Pack
items.description: This animation pack only works with R15 avatars. Loves heavy metal, but he only knows one dance.

items.name: Triple-Headed Trouble
items.description: With rip-roaring jaws and ship-shape claws, this guard dog’s ready for a brawl they’ll never forget! Winning entry in the 2018 Rthro Design Contest. Created by Mechawave.

items.name: Ostrichsized Winter Scarf
items.description: What does it mean to be Ostrichsized?  Ostrichsized means kicking in the teeth of any man who chooses to fight a horse-sized duck over a hundred duck sized horses.  It means fighting robotic dinosaurs with a laser sword dipped in unicorn tears for fun.  It means wearing a scarf for a California winter.

items.name: Disintergrex Blast Gun
items.description: Veteran space pirates swear by these, though they are hard to find these days. Manufactured specifically to combat robots in the War of the Second Uprising, the Disintergrex uses patented tri-pulse technology. Thus the hugely successful marketing slogan: "If it's still moving, shoot it three times!"
